story.text:
# 🎭 Soulbis ⚔️
**cast** · swordsman · narrative · tier archetype · ⚔️

The First Swordsman archetype. Cast roster anchor at V63 (Sovereign's Seat). Mirrors the existing per-soulbis persona; kept here for cast-roster contiguity.

## Edges out

- *keeps* → [[Star Manifold (soulbis /star)]]
- *keeps* → [[Lattice Codex (soulbis /lattice)]]
- *inhabits* → [[V63 — Sovereign Anchor (Soulbis · the reader)]]
- *kin_to* → [[Soulbis ⚔️]]
- *founds* → [[City of Mages]]
- *kin_to* → [[Soulbae 🧙 (cast)]]
